subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1919-12-14
subcodes.first_line: The various parties of Iran have not awakened [3.5s]... ...one day Satan went to the bedside of Mu'awiyah and woke him up to perform his obligatory prayer.
subcodes.first_line_orig: احزاب مختلفه ایران متنبه نشده اند... شیطان به بالین معاویه آمد و او را برای ادای نماز
subcodes.subjects: @hypocrisy, @past, present and future of Iran, @selfishness; self-love; egotism; self-indulgence
